news.title: Global market: Chinese stocks sink to one-month lows as Middle East tensions trigger a broad selloff
news.description: Chinese stocks experienced a significant downturn on Monday, reaching monthly lows. Escalating Middle East geopolitical tensions dampened investor sentiment and triggered widespread profit-taking. High-growth sectors like defence and technology saw sharp declines, while defensive stocks gained.

news.title: More mutual funds don’t always mean better diversification: How to avoid the portfolio overlap trap
news.description: According to the expert, investors should add a new mutual fund only if it reduces portfolio concentration, adds meaningful diversification, and fits your financial goals. A compact portfolio of 5 to 6 funds can often provide better diversification.

news.title: The pale, eyeless olm salamander of Slovenian caves can go up to a decade without eating and lives more than 100 years, spending nearly its entire existence motionless in cold darkness it has never once seen.
